label: Repo command Work Record adapter test capture
summary: The focused Work Record adapter test command completed successfully with two passing tests and zero failures.

intent.summary: Capture focused Work Record adapter test evidence as a completed Work Record v0.
intent.purpose: Prove the Work Record capture path can normalize a bounded repo command into immutable evidence, Claims, Postconditions, Claim Results, a Verifier Report, and Health.
intent.acceptance: The generated Work Record validates against the v0 schema, passes the named report-only verifier profile, and opens read-only through the existing Work Record workbench model.
constraints: Use one deterministic repo command as the bounded evidence source.
Do not introduce autonomous replay or repair behavior.
Keep replay and repair gated by workflow policy.
